question: Design second Ramsey/T2star/13C follow-up on accepted r03 after terminal fine weak-pi pODMR refined the center.

inputs.local_literature_search: grep local literature index for 13C/Ramsey/T2star returned no indexed hits this wake
inputs.lab_prior_guardrail: NV_RESEARCH_KNOWLEDGE Shot Budget And Data Quality Ramsey FFT sampling guardrail and non-claim-grade scout lesson

protocol_inspection.xml_active_path: full_experiment=0: readout1 true mS=0 reference; Ramsey pi/2 - free tau - phase-advanced pi/2 via ramsey(..., tau, det, ...); readout2 Ramsey signal
protocol_inspection.readout_roles: readout1 reference, readout2 Ramsey signal when full_experiment=0

bool_vars.note: present in typed vars but inactive for full_experiment=0; preserve bool var path

model.first_ramsey_mismatch_diagnostic: First scout at det=1.5 MHz had a non-claim-grade exploratory component near 0.884 MHz. Repeating with det=1.0 MHz deliberately tests whether a real Ramsey carrier/sideband follows the programmed phase ramp; a fixed ~0.884 MHz feature would argue artifact/noise.
model.expected_raw_oscillation_scale: order 2-6 kcps if Ramsey contrast is comparable to prior scout and bounded by the 11.9% fine-pODMR raw dip / ~22% setup mS=0 vs mS=+1 contrast.
model.distinguishability: 8 averages x 50000 repetitions doubles the first Ramsey shot count to 400000 shots per tau point. SEM should improve by about sqrt(2) relative to the 4x50000 scout while keeping each tracking window unchanged; 8 us span gives 125 kHz resolution for 1.0 MHz carrier and 0.615/1.385 MHz 13C sidebands.

planned_measurement.analysis_plan: Terminal raw/readout review first, then FFT/least-squares screens at det=1.0 MHz and det +/- f13C. Fit T2star only if a carrier/decay shape is supported in raw/readout-aware data and not just normalization-only or fit-only evidence.

decision: Preview advisory and verify intent. If queue is idle and advisory/verifier have no blockers, enqueue as a second Ramsey/T2star claim-attempt/diagnostic on r03.
